name: Crockpot Beef with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 cup flour with salt and pepper, then coat the beef cubes thoroughly. Place them in the crockpot along with shallots and mushrooms. Combine beef broth, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato paste, then pour over the beef and vegetables. Stir well. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 12 hours or on high for 4 to 6 hours.
2. One hour before serving, switch to high setting. Make a smooth paste with red wine and 3 tablespoons flour; stir into the crockpot, mixing well. Cover and cook until thickened. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
